prompt: Tell the story of how capacitor tracks and restores Claude Code sessions

assertions.name: has_cross_references
assertions.description: Contains §N cross-references in prose (not just headings) linking sections together

assertions.name: has_code_excerpts_with_paths
assertions.description: Code blocks include file path annotations (e.g., // path/to/file.rs:LL)

assertions.name: has_design_reasoning
assertions.description: Contains explicit design decision discussion — why choices were made, alternatives considered

assertions.name: has_mermaid_diagrams
assertions.description: Includes at least one Mermaid diagram

assertions.name: has_narrative_transitions
assertions.description: Sections connect with forward/backward prose transitions, not just standalone entries

assertions.name: prose_before_code
assertions.description: Each major code block is preceded by explanatory prose introducing the idea

assertions.name: reads_as_essay
assertions.description: The document has a narrative arc — motivation, development, resolution — not a flat module-by-module listing
